execute.sql:
CREATE TABLE "public"."profiles" (
  "created_at" timestamptz DEFAULT (now()) NOT NULL,
  "display_name" text,
  "email" text NOT NULL,
  "id" character(36) NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public"."public_messages" (
  "author_id" character(36) NOT NULL,
  "body" text NOT NULL,
  "created_at" timestamptz DEFAULT (now()) NOT NULL,
  "id" character(36) NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public"."todos" (
  "completed" bool NOT NULL,
  "created_at" timestamptz DEFAULT (now()) NOT NULL,
  "id" character(36) NOT NULL,
  "title" text NOT NULL,
  "user_id" character(36) NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

precheck.description: ensure RLS is not yet enabled on "profiles"
precheck.sql: SELECT relrowsecurity = false FROM pg_class c JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid = c.relnamespace WHERE n.nspname = 'public' AND c.relname = 'profiles'

execute.sql: ALTER TABLE "public"."profiles" ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY

postcheck.sql: SELECT relrowsecurity = true FROM pg_class c JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid = c.relnamespace WHERE n.nspname = 'public' AND c.relname = 'profiles'

precheck.description: ensure policy "profiles_select_own" does not yet exist
precheck.sql: SELECT NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pg_policies WHERE schemaname = 'public' AND tablename = 'profiles' AND policyname = 'profiles_select_own')

execute.sql: CREATE POLICY "profiles_select_own" ON "public"."profiles" FOR SELECT TO "authenticated" USING ((id = (auth.uid())::text))

postcheck.sql: SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pg_policies WHERE schemaname = 'public' AND tablename = 'profiles' AND policyname = 'profiles_select_own')

precheck.description: ensure policy "profiles_update_own" does not yet exist
precheck.sql: SELECT NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pg_policies WHERE schemaname = 'public' AND tablename = 'profiles' AND policyname = 'profiles_update_own')

execute.sql: CREATE POLICY "profiles_update_own" ON "public"."profiles" FOR UPDATE TO "authenticated" USING ((id = (auth.uid())::text)) WITH CHECK ((id = (auth.uid())::text))

postcheck.sql: SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pg_policies WHERE schemaname = 'public' AND tablename = 'profiles' AND policyname = 'profiles_update_own')

precheck.description: ensure policy "public_messages_select_public" does not yet exist

execute.sql: CREATE POLICY "public_messages_select_public" ON "public"."public_messages" FOR SELECT TO "anon", "authenticated" USING (true)

postcheck.sql: SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pg_policies WHERE schemaname = 'public' AND tablename = 'public_messages' AND policyname = 'public_messages_select_public')

precheck.description: ensure policy "public_messages_insert_own" does not yet exist
